title: Algorand unveils roadmap to achieve quantum resistance by 2028
summary: The announcement reflects a crypto's growing recognition that adopting quantum-resistant cryptography could take years, requiring changes not only to user wallets but also to core protocol infrastructure.

title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) jumps 10% while index declines
summary: Internet Computer (ICP) fell 4.1% and Sui (SUI) dropped 4%, leading the index lower from Wednesday.

title: Alchemy's AI-driven identity and payment service gains access to Visa network
summary: The AgentCard integration with Visa Intelligent Commerce allows AI agents built on models from any provider, including OpenAI or Anthropic, to effect commercial transactions.

title: Hive shares jumps 10% on $220m Canada sovereign AI infrastructure deal
summary: GPU cloud contract with Bell and Cohere strengthens HIVE's shift from bitcoin mining to high performance AI computing.

title: The great rotation: Investors desert the Magnificent 7, crypto for AI bottlenecks
summary: Capital is flowing out of the largest tech companies and bitcoin as investors pile into semiconductors, memory stocks and space-related opportunities.
